creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
The sysutils/3dm port provides a ports-based method for installing 3DM2, a management and monitoring daemon for 3ware RAID controllers.  3ware was bought by LSI years ago and 3ware products are no longer made.  I no longer have any 3ware controllers and can not adequately test and support this port.  The port has been unfetchable for some time and no one has said anything.  To me, that indicates there is no demand for this port.

Given the above, please delete sysutils/3dm.
